mapper.sql: medicine_id, name, specification, dosage_form, form, manufacturer, barcode, expiry_date, price, stock, warning_stock, warning_threshold, min_stock, unit, pharmacology, indications, dosage, side_effects, storage, status, is_prescription, category, location, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_medicine( name, specification, dosage_form, form, manufacturer, barcode, expiry_date, price, stock, warning_stock, warning_threshold, min_stock, unit, pharmacology, indications, dosage, side_effects, storage, status, is_prescription, category, location, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{specification}, #{dosageForm}, #{form}, #{manufacturer}, #{barcode}, #{expiryDate}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{warningStock}, #{warningThreshold}, #{minStock}, #{unit}, #{pharmacology}, #{indications}, #{dosage}, #{sideEffects}, #{storage}, #{status}, #{isPrescription}, #{category}, #{location}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinic_medicine WHERE stock <= warning_stock

SELECT FROM clinic_medicine WHERE medicine_id IN
#{id}
SELECT FROM clinic_medicine WHERE barcode = #{barcode} LIMIT 1
